chunks.title: Frontline AI | AI Workers for Business Growth
chunks.text: More capacity without hiring first. For one-person businesses, an AI worker is an extra resource while you grow. For larger teams, the savings multiply across every repeated sales, reception and admin process. Capture enquiries while you are on jobs, in meetings or away from the phone. Add capacity before you are ready to hire. Reduce admin pressure, speed up response times and keep follow-up consistent while your team handles the work that matters. Multiply savings across call handling, booking, lead qualification and customer operations where repeated work adds up fast. Start with one worker. Build the workforce. Each AI worker is designed around a real business job, not a generic chatbot. Start with the repeated front-office task that leaks the most time or revenue, then add more workers once the first one proves value. Answers calls, captures customer details, routes enquiries, creates callback records and keeps the first response moving. Qualifies leads, asks the first questions, scores fit and pushes good enquiries toward a demo, quote or booking. Collects booking intent, handles appointment requests, supports cancellations and prepares clean scheduling records.

chunks.title: Frontline AI | AI Workers for Business Growth
chunks.text: Turns missed calls and abandoned enquiries into structured follow-up instead of letting warm leads disappear. Handles structured intake, caller details, matter routing, callback requests and audit-ready legal workflow support. Tell us the repeated job. We design the workflow, records, routing, testing and handover around your actual process. Cloud AI support for service businesses. For businesses that do not need a full custom build, Frontline AI can provide a supported monthly service: enquiry handling, missed lead recovery, customer follow-up and a cloud dashboard with ongoing support. Book a call for pricing. Capture enquiries, callback requests and intake details before they are lost. Recover missed calls, booking requests and service enquiries from busy workshops. Support appointment enquiries, patient callbacks and follow-up requests. Handle booking questions, event enquiries and follow-up while staff are busy. Capture viewing requests, valuation leads and property enquiries quickly. Capture appointment enquiries, recover missed calls, send reminders and keep repeat customers moving. Capture emergency leaks, boiler issues, quote requests and same-day callouts.

chunks.title: Frontline AI | AI Workers for Business Growth
chunks.text: Route lockouts, urgent access issues, key problems and same-day callouts. Handle out-of-hours building repairs, tenant issues and urgent maintenance requests. Qualify job enquiries, site visits, quotes, project details and follow-up. Capture urgent faults, installation enquiries, safety checks and callback requests. Premium websites, built to capture enquiries and power AI. Frontline AI builds state-of-the-art websites for serious service businesses. Premium design, conversion-focused pages, enquiry capture, booking routes and AI-ready content structure — built so your website can become part of your operating system. Guides visitors into a fact-find, booking or clean team handoff. RAG Assistants & Integrated Website Builds Turn your website, documents and business knowledge into a controlled assistant that helps visitors take the right next step. This is not just a chatbot. Frontline AI can build assistants that connect approved knowledge, business processes and website journeys, then hand the useful next step into bookings, enquiries, email, SMS, WhatsApp or dashboard workflows. Launch is controlled, tested and improved from real usage.

chunks.title: Frontline AI | AI Workers for Business Growth
chunks.text: The assistant stays inside approved knowledge, then moves the visitor toward a useful next action. Website Knowledge Assistant Answer from approved service pages, FAQs and business content. Document / Policy Assistant Use controlled documents, PDFs or guidance as source material. Lead & Booking Assistant Guide visitors into enquiries, bookings or fact-find requests. Workflow Integration Hand off to email, SMS, WhatsApp, CRM or dashboard actions. Resources and proof. These pages show the delivery method behind the build: controlled changes, test evidence, review checkpoints and clean handover. Controlled Build Method How Frontline AI keeps fast builds controlled, reviewed and testable. Change Control Procedure How changes are planned, reviewed, tested and accepted before becoming part of the live build. See where AI workers, RAG assistants, website builds or monthly support could fit your business. Your first AI worker starts with the right fact-find. Reception, sales, booking or follow-up. We identify the biggest profit leak before suggesting the right AI worker. Your first AI worker before your first hire.

chunks.title: Premium Websites & AI-Ready Builds | Frontline AI
chunks.text: Premium websites, built to capture enquiries and power AI. Frontline AI builds state-of-the-art websites for serious service businesses: premium visual direction, clear conversion journeys, booking and enquiry capture, and a content structure ready for controlled AI assistants, RAG knowledge and workflow automation. Designed for businesses where the website needs to do more than look good: it must qualify demand, route visitors and become the foundation for AI-powered operations. Guides visitors into a fact-find, booking or clean team handoff. Premium websites that look expensive and capture useful enquiries. Not template brochure sites. Frontline AI builds image-led service websites with clear offers, sharp calls to action, booking routes, enquiry capture and a structure ready for assistants and workflow handoff. Premium visual direction for the industries where first impressions matter. Restaurants, salons, clinics, property firms, trades and professional services all need different signals of trust. We shape the site around the customer decision, the enquiry route and the visual standard your market expects. From premium website to tested enquiry system.

chunks.title: Premium Websites & AI-Ready Builds | Frontline AI
chunks.text: Your website should not stop at looking good. The build maps what a visitor sees, what they click, what details are captured and where that enquiry goes next. Clarify the services, sectors, proof and first conversion goal. Shape the route from page visit to enquiry, booking or fact-find. Create the pages, forms, assistant prompts and handoff routes. Test mobile, copy, links, forms, workflow and assistant readiness. Choose the level of website system you need. Start with a premium website, then add assistant, enquiry capture, booking routes or a full operating layer when the business is ready. A polished service-business website with strong content, premium visuals and clear conversion routes. Homepage and core service pages Responsive design and launch polish Clear CTAs, forms and sector positioning A premium website with a controlled knowledge assistant ready to answer from approved content. Website-ready knowledge structure Assistant prompts and safe escalation Fact-find and booking routing Connect website enquiries into notifications, callback queues, booking records or dashboard-style views. Structured forms and enquiry routing Callback, booking or quote queues

chunks.title: Premium Websites & AI-Ready Builds | Frontline AI

Book a focused fact-find and Frontline AI will map the first website build worth launching.

chunks.title: Managed AI Services | Frontline AI
chunks.text: Managed AI services for businesses that want outcomes, not software projects. Frontline AI can run practical AI services around reception, missed leads, bookings, callbacks, website assistants and growth intelligence — so the business gets results without having to operate the system itself. What this includes. This is a draft commercial page so the offer is visible in the menu now. We can replace sections with real proof, screenshots and campaign results as we build it out. Managed AI Reception Capture calls, enquiries and callbacks with a supported AI front-office layer. Managed Booking & Callback Handling Keep appointment requests, quote enquiries and follow-ups moving. Managed RAG Website Assistant Operate an approved-knowledge assistant for website visitors and document-led questions. Monthly AI Operations Support Review usage, improve prompts, update flows and keep the service useful. Competitor monitoring, campaign angles and growth intelligence as an ongoing service. Reporting & Improvement Monthly visibility into activity, opportunities and improvements. Proof slots ready to fill.

chunks.title: LawFlow Pro | Frontline AI
chunks.text: AI legal intake, conflict-aware routing and action control for modern law firms. LawFlow Pro turns calls, messages and enquiries into structured legal actions, with AI-assisted intake, matter matching, conflict-aware routing, follow-up, audit control and solicitor-side AI support. Draft emails where configured, research legal or client context, prepare updates, create reminders, plan travel or visit notes, and support day-to-day admin within controlled permissions and audit boundaries. Built and delivered by Frontline AI as either a custom build or a managed service. Real operational dashboard proof Staff can see matters, actions, callbacks, ownership and urgency in one live legal action board. Capture calls, forms, messages and enquiries before they disappear into inboxes or missed callbacks. Collect structured details and classify matter type, urgency and next action. Conflict & Entity Check Route conflict-sensitive, restricted or urgent matters into review before the wrong action is taken. Action Board & Follow-Up Create owned actions for callbacks, follow-up, matter setup, approval gates and staff tasks. Inside the LawFlow workspace

chunks.title: LawFlow Pro | Frontline AI
chunks.text: LawFlow Pro is organised around the work your firm actually needs to control: intake, consultations, callbacks, restricted records, conflict review, audit history, AI support and call-flow automation. Call, web form, email, SMS or WhatsApp route. Key details, matter type, urgency and missing information. Entity, matter, conflict and restricted-record logic. Callback, conflict review, consultation or staff task. The right person follows up with a controlled audit trail. Real LawFlow Pro screens, not generic mockups. These proof assets show the working product ecosystem: live legal action visibility, configurable workflow automation and staff-side AI Helper operations. Live Legal Action Board A central operating view for legal actions, callbacks, matter activity and firm-wide intake visibility. Call Flow Designer Configurable call-flow and workflow controls for intake routes, escalation steps and approved legal process design. Each solicitor can access AI Helper for day-to-day operational support: drafting emails, preparing updates, researching legal or client context, creating reminders, planning travel or visit notes, and keeping matters moving within controlled permissions.

chunks.title: LawFlow Pro | Frontline AI
chunks.text: Conflict, entity and matter controls for legal operations. LawFlow Pro is designed around the operational realities of firms: conflict search, audit rows, entity relationships, matter libraries and controlled linking between people and matters. Conflict Admin & Audit History Conflict search, audit rows and compliance review support for safer intake and matter handling. Entity & Relationship Management Entity relationships, client, opponent and witness links, plus custom matter type library setup. Create matters, link entities to matters and manage the matter library with clearer operational control. A tailored legal intake and action-control system for your firm. Built around your departments, matter types and workflow Configured call flows, intake forms and routing Conflict, entity and restricted-record controls Dashboard, audit and staff workflows Frontline AI helps run, refine and improve the system monthly. Monthly workflow review and improvement planning Updates to wording, routing and follow-up Support for email, SMS, WhatsApp and dashboard actions Ongoing controlled changes and testing Capture every enquiry

chunks.title: LawFlow Pro | Frontline AI
chunks.text: Stop valuable legal enquiries disappearing into missed calls, inboxes, forms or delayed follow-up. Reduce operational risk Keep conflict-sensitive, restricted and urgent matters visible before they become a problem. Move faster with control Turn intake into action without losing auditability, routing discipline or human review. See how LawFlow Pro fits your firm Start with a focused demo and map the first controlled workflow worth building.

chunks.title: Frontline AI · Controlled Build Method
chunks.text: Custom business systems, delivered with control. Frontline AI combines modern development speed with serious delivery discipline: clear requirements, version-controlled changes, test evidence, release checkpoints and clean client handover. The problem with many fast builds Speed is useful. But speed without control creates mystery code, fragile fixes and unclear ownership. The benefit of controlled delivery Smaller businesses get the practical controls normally associated with serious delivery programmes, without carrying the cost of a large permanent team. Frontline speed. Enterprise-style discipline. This is not a generate-and-hope approach. It is a controlled delivery process adapted from business-critical implementation work, made lean enough for smaller companies. Every feature starts as a clear business outcome and acceptance point. Practical architecture decisions before code is changed. Modern AI-assisted tooling speeds up inspection, coding and iteration. Every change is visible before it is trusted. Key endpoints and workflows are linked back to requirements. Client receives release notes, repo access and support detail. A lean team model, senior where it matters.

chunks.title: Frontline AI · Controlled Build Method
chunks.text: Most smaller builds do not need a large permanent development team. They need clear ownership, controlled delivery and the right specialist input at the right time. Requirement-linked test evidence. Instead of vague “it works” claims, important features are linked to visible test outcomes and release evidence. Version control and client handover. Every approved release can be committed, pushed to a private GitHub repository and documented for future support. Example release history What the client receives Your build includes A lightweight but serious delivery pack designed to make the system easier to own, support and extend. Not a black-box freelancer build. Not an expensive consultancy machine. A lean, controlled delivery model for practical business systems — combining modern development speed with version history, test evidence and accountable handover.

chunks.title: Change Control Procedure | Frontline AI
chunks.text: Change control that protects your AI build. Frontline AI builds websites, AI workers, chatbots, portals and automations under a controlled change process. That means changes are planned, reviewed, tested and accepted before they become part of your live system. Why change control matters. Fast development is useful only when the work remains understandable, reviewable and safe. Change control prevents rushed edits, hidden mistakes and unclear decisions from damaging your website, AI workflow or business process. Changes are made in clear, limited steps so problems can be spotted before they spread across the project. Accepted versions are tracked, making it easier to understand what changed and recover from unwanted behaviour. You get a build process that favours evidence, review and useful outcomes rather than random edits. The client-facing procedure. This is the practical sequence used to keep a project under control from first request through to live acceptance. We clarify what is being changed, why it matters, what outcome is expected and what should not be touched. Inspect the current state

chunks.title: Change Control Procedure | Frontline AI
chunks.text: Before editing, we check the current page, workflow, form, API, design or behaviour so the change is based on reality. Make one controlled change Work is kept narrow. A design change is not mixed with unrelated backend, content, server or data changes unless agreed. Review what changed The actual difference is checked so accidental removals, broad rewrites or unrelated edits can be caught early. The changed area is tested in the browser, form, workflow or live route depending on what the change affects. Once the change is approved, it becomes part of the controlled build history so future work starts from a stable point. Designed for AI systems, not just websites. AI workers, chatbots and workflow automations need more control than a normal brochure site. A small wording change, routing change or form change can affect leads, bookings, customer messages, records and handovers. That is why Frontline AI treats change control as part of the product, not an afterthought. What this protects. The same process applies whether we are building a marketing page, an AI receptionist, a booking journey, a client portal or a document-aware assistant.

chunks.title: Change Control Procedure | Frontline AI
chunks.text: Design, content, navigation, landing pages, forms, SEO structure and conversion journeys. Reception, sales, booking, follow-up and custom workflow workers that handle real enquiries. Website assistants that answer questions, qualify visitors and route enquiries toward action. Document-aware systems that answer from business content, policies, FAQs and knowledge bases. Every change should be easy to classify. If the result is unclear, we pause rather than pushing uncertainty into the live system. No mystery changes. Your build should not rely on blind edits or unexplained changes. Frontline AI keeps work visible, controlled and reviewable from the first page to the final workflow. Planned changes protect the build.

chunks.title: AI Worker Fact-Find | Frontline AI
chunks.text: Book a fact-find for your first AI worker. Pick a slot, then tell us what your business does, where time or leads are being lost, and which AI worker may create value first. This is a short discovery call, not a hard-sell demo. The goal is to understand the opportunity before suggesting the right AI worker. Choose a fact-find slot 30-minute UK-time slots. Once selected, the slot is reserved for your fact-find call.

chunks.title: About Frontline AI | Practical AI Systems Built Under Control
chunks.text: What Frontline AI does. We turn practical AI ideas into working business systems: enquiry handling, missed lead recovery, booking support, knowledge assistants, client portals, dashboards and connected workflows. AI reception, sales, booking, follow-up and custom workflow workers designed around real customer contact, not generic chatbot demos. Assistants that answer from your FAQs, service notes, policies, PDFs, knowledge base or operational content. Websites built around action: clear services, strong calls to action, booking routes, enquiry capture and follow-up workflows. Why we build this way. AI systems can become messy quickly if they are rushed. Frontline AI uses controlled delivery so each improvement has purpose, value, review, testing and a stable checkpoint. Frontline AI is for service businesses where missed enquiries, slow replies, repeated questions or manual admin directly affect revenue, customer experience or team capacity. Capture enquiries and follow-up while you are on jobs, in meetings or handling delivery. Give staff cleaner records, clearer handoffs and fewer repeated manual tasks.

chunks.title: About Frontline AI | Practical AI Systems Built Under Control
chunks.text: Support reception, booking, sales, customer questions and follow-up across busy periods. Use RAG assistants to answer from controlled content rather than vague generic AI responses. The controlled delivery promise. We do not sell AI hype and disappear. The aim is to build useful systems that can be inspected, improved, tested and handed over cleanly. We look for cost saving, revenue recovery, faster response or reduced admin before deciding what should be built first. Changes should be visible, understandable and narrow enough to check without damaging unrelated parts of the build. Accepted improvements become a reliable point to continue from, instead of relying on memory or guesswork. Start with a practical fact-find. We identify where AI, a RAG assistant, website build, dashboard or monthly support service could create the most value first.
